named_registry_t(3) Library Functions Manual named_registry_t(3)

NAME

named_registry_t - Global registry with uthash and rwlock.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


named_entry_t * entries
rwlock_t entries_lock
lifecycle_t lifecycle
int dummy

Detailed Description

Global registry with uthash and rwlock.

Uses uthash for O(1) lookups protected by rwlock. Rwlock is held ONLY during HASH_ADD/HASH_FIND operations. No mutations occur while holding the lock - avoids deadlocks.

Definition at line 62 of file debug/named.c.
